description: Lead a 200+ member technical club. Organized inter-university hackathons, workshops, and coding competitions. Managed club operations and liaised with industry sponsors.
Led a 6-member team in the IEEE Region 10 Robotics Competition. Designed and built an autonomous line-follower robot that placed 2nd regionally.
Taught mathematics and science to underprivileged secondary school students in Dhaka as part of a national education initiative.
Represented BUET at the ICPC Asia Dhaka Regional contest. Solved 5 out of 11 problems, placing in the top 20% of participating teams.
